revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_medalist%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}} |- |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}} |} ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[''athlete's name'']]|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with [[''athlete's name'']]
{{flagg|unc|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unc with unci. * {{ml|flag|medalist}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|medalist|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template that renders output on a single line *[[Template:Flag IOC medalist]] for a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations {{flag templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
